title: Kladno, Central Bohemia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kladno, Central Bohemia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kladno is a city in Central Bohemia with a population of 69,000. A Central Bohemian city with a rich industrial history, now a growing commuter hub near Prague with expanding residential areas.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
